workflow.name: Adaptive Code Review
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ECC ADAPTIVE CODE REVIEW — Orchestrator selects and spawns agents based on story complexity
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at Step 4 triage and Step 6 test health decisions.

step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-story-discovery.md

step.goal: Spawn selected ECC review agents in parallel
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-parallel-spawn.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-synthesis.md

step.goal: Smart triage — classify and act on findings
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-triage.md

step.goal: Deferred item audit + tech debt story creation
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-debt-tracking.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-test-health.md

step.goal: Cost tracking, E2E analysis, and story completion
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-completion.md
